channel.title: American Mineralogist
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in American Mineralogist

item.title: Fluids in the shallow mantle of southeastern Australia: Insights from phase equilibria
item.description: Article by Anhuai Lu DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2022-8735

item.title: Compositional effects on the etching of fossil confined fission tracks in apatite
item.description: Article by Anhuai Lu DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2024-9331

item.title: High-pressure phase transition of olivine-type Mg2GeO4 to a metastable forsterite-III type structure and their equations of state
item.description: Article by Anhuai Lu DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9208

item.title: The application of “transfer learning” in optical microscopy: The petrographic classification of opaque minerals
item.description: Article by Anhuai Lu DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9092

item.title: Mechanisms of fluid degassing in shallow magma chambers control the formation of porphyry deposits
item.description: Article by Anhuai Lu DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9091

item.title: The OH-stretching region in infrared spectra of the apatite OH-Cl binary system
item.description: Article by Anhuai Lu DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9059

item.title: Thermal equation of state of Li-rich schorl up to 15.5 GPa and 673 K: Implications for lithium and boron transport in slab subduction
item.description: Article by Anhuai Lu DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9150

item.title: Raman scattering of omphacite at high pressure: Toward its possible application to elastic geothermobarometry

item.title: Interpreting mineral deposit genesis classification with decision maps: A case study using pyrite trace elements
item.description: Article by Anhuai Lu DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9254

item.title: Geochemical characteristics of mineral inclusions in the Luobusa chromitite (Southern Tibet): Implications for an intricate geological setting
item.description: Article by Anhuai Lu DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9273

item.title: Three new iron-phosphate minerals from the El Ali iron meteorite, Somalia: Elaliite Fe82+ Fe3+(PO4)O8, elkinstantonite Fe4(PO4)2O, and olsenite KFe4(PO4)3
item.description: Article by Anhuai Lu DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9225

item.title: Book Review: Celebrating the International Year of Mineralogy: Progress and Landmark Discoveries of the Last Decades
